understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the tile grid to reach the goal gem tile marked `+` without dying, using at most 2 attempts with 50 turns each, and then continue clearing subsequent levels until the game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn I can MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only). After any horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile, hit a hazard (like spikes `u`/`v`, which immediately ends the attempt), or reach the goal `+` (which wins the level). CLICK interacts with clickable tiles—primarily removing breakable blocks `x` at a specified [x,y] to open a fall path or change where gravity will land me; clicks do not consume platform-timer moves when a rising platform is present. UNDO reverts the previous action to recover from a bad move or click. Planning relies on the state’s landing previews (left_landing/right_landing) and corridor_scan to prioritize moves that create a 'passage' (a drop to a different y-level) and to avoid landing on spikes.
